---
title: "Emily Blunt"
---

## Emily Blunt

### Description

teacher at Miss Finlaison’s school

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th      [1900]
- Letter from Sept 19 [1899]
- [To Mary Yonge, Oct 18th [1897[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3385_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
